name: Fresh Blueberry Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a bowl. Beat for 5 minutes at medium speed with an electric mixer or until smooth.
2. Gently fold in the blueberries and pour the filling into the prepared pastry shell.
3. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
4. In another bowl, combine the remaining ingredients and stir well. Sprinkle over the top of the pie.
5. Bake for an additional 10 minutes, then chill before serving.
